content: Phase A of the culture-core merge-back (culture#462) executed 2026-07-02, PR agentculture/culture#463, version 14.0.0. Engine culture_core/ + suite (1683 tests) copied verbatim from culture-core@bbb11c0 (v0.17.0 — that repo has NO git tags; main HEAD is the source of record). Only deltas vs upstream: culture_core/__init__.py reads version from the culture dist; cli/console.py hint says pip install culture. Test reconciliation: the fake-culture_core front-door harness (13.7.1) was REMOVED — with the engine in-tree its isolation rationale is gone, and conftest sys.modules fake-seeding would poison the engine suite in shared workers; test_frontdoor_cutover.py now runs against the real engine; test_engine_identity.py exempts it from the dotted culture.<module> scan (its job is exercising the alias namespace); test_packaging_entrypoints.py pins scripts == {culture, culture-core} both -> culture_core.cli:main. The culture-core console script is kept as a compat alias. Merge ships the attention_overrides fix (culture-core#9) that was crashing claude/codex/copilot mesh agents. Coverage 92% both packages, floor 90. Phase B = culture-core#28 (retire repo/dist), blocked on #463.

chat.agentculture.org restored 2026-07-02 and made reboot-durable: the whole spark mesh now runs under enabled systemd user units with linger — culture-server-spark, culture-console-spark (irc-lens on 127.0.0.1:8765), cloudflared-chat (token in 0600 ~/.config/cloudflared/chat-agentculture-org.token, pattern copied from cloudflared-vllm), and CLI-installed culture-agent-spark-{agentirc,colleague}. The 1033 was: console+tunnel were nohup-only and the running cloudflared was the vllm tunnel. irc-lens config gained auth.allowed_service_tokens with the cf-roundtrip service token so headless curl through CF Access returns 200. Server/console/tunnel units are still hand-written — replacing them with CLI provisioning verbs is plan task t13.

Gotcha (observed 2026-07-02): culture_core/cli/agents.py resolves daemon factories with _BACKEND_DAEMON_FACTORIES.get(backend, _create_claude_daemon) — an unknown backend (e.g. backend: colleague before it exists, or a typo) SILENTLY runs the claude daemon instead of erroring. spark-colleague ran as a claude agent unnoticed. Fix is plan task t2 in the 2026-07-02 three-minds plan: unknown backend must exit with an actionable error naming the valid set. As of 2026-07-02 the fix (PR #471, PR2b) replaces the .get(..., _create_claude_daemon) fallback with _resolve_daemon_factory, which raises CultureError on an explicitly-set unknown backend — this record describes the pre-fix behavior.

Since Phase C (#465) made backend SDKs optional extras, a bare uv tool install culture cannot start claude-backend agents (CultureError: missing claude_agent_sdk). Install with uv tool install --force --python 3.12 'culture[all-backends]' — and note uv may resolve python 3.11 by default, which fails culture's >=3.12 requirement.

Workforce lesson (2026-07-02 wave 0): colleague drives on the local vLLM Qwen3.6-27B must be dispatched SERIALLY, one drive with the GPU to itself — 3-way contention produced 600s turns, request timeouts, malformed tool-call markup, and a mid-flight model eviction (404) on the hot-swapping multi-model rig. Solo, the same model produced 5-star work (t5 agentfront migration, PR #468, full suite green first try). Also: keep the installed colleague CLI current — 1.30.0 died at step 0 on malformed tool calls (KeyError 'command'/'path'), fixed by the 1.31/1.32 dispatch-boundary hardening; upgraded to local 1.33.0 via uv tool install --force --python 3.12 /home/spark/git/colleague.

Three-minds plan wave 0 shipped 2026-07-02 (tracking culture#467, spec+plan PR #466): PR #468 agentfront migration (t5, colleague-built), PR #471 unknown-backend hard error (t2), PR #470 parity narrowed to claude/codex/colleague with copilot/acp stale-exempt (t7), PR #469 culture server/console install provisioning verbs (t13), cultureagent#45 colleague-backend hand-off (t6). Each PR independently green, bumped from main (three claim 14.1.1, #469 claims 14.2.0) — later merges rebase CHANGELOG. Wave 1: t1 colleague wiring (needs cultureagent#45 shipped), t15 stale marking, t9 App-registry CLI, t14 reboot verification (needs coordinated host reboot).

2026-07-03 outage + recovery: culture-server-spark crash-looped ~15h (11,235 restarts). Root cause chain: (1) the unit had been generated by culture server install run from the agent-t13 dev worktree, so ExecStart baked in the worktree venv python via sys.executable; (2) --config was passed as quoted literal ~/.culture/mesh.yaml, and neither the CLI nor load_mesh_config (culture_core/mesh_config.py) expanduser it -> ENOENT; (3) config errors exit 1 while the unit only halts restarts on exit 78, so it looped forever. Recovery: uv tool upgrade culture (agentirc-cli 9.10.0->9.11.0), rerun culture server install from the INSTALLED tool (writes expanded path + tool-venv python), daemon-reload + restart; spark-agentirc/spark-colleague auto-reconnected in <=60s. Gotcha: the long-running console process predated the venv upgrade and 404d on /upload — restart culture-console-spark after any culture venv upgrade. Config gap fixed: media.public_base_url: https://chat.agentculture.org added to ~/.config/irc-lens/config.yaml (without it capability URLs carry 127.0.0.1:8765). Verified image AND audio byte-identical round-trips through CF Access with the cf-roundtrip service token (~/git/irc-lens/.cf-roundtrip.env, IRC_LENS_TEST_* vars). Durable engine fixes specced in devague frame the-spark-culture-mesh-is-always-on-under-cli-prov (expanduser, exit-78 fail-fast, install provenance guard, pin floors agentirc-cli>=9.11 irc-lens>=0.8).
